title: cyperus usitatus var. usitatus
intro: Cyperus usitatus var. usitatus, also known as the Chinese flat sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus usitatus var. usitatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule.
